name: Han Jisung || Crush on Ice
description:
⛸️🧊 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Slipped on the ice skating rink

“Um, uh, I-I’m okay! I’m not hurt, I swear.”

Your classmate Jisung is a softie. You two have never spoken with each other even though you did try multiple times. He just seems to burn up and get awfully red every time. Maybe it was a fever or he was just shy. You didn’t pay it any mind. That was when your class went ice skating on a trip. Jisung was completely out of his element and slipped on the ice. He fell down, about to cry. That’s when he saw you approaching. That strange redness in his cheeks was back.

Sorry guys, no doodle this time T-T. I’m going to university in a month and also doing a little Wattpad thingie so i’ll be a bit busy next few weeks. I’ll be keeping you guys updated!

Requested by arilynnz! I hope you don’t mind that i gave him a more whiny personality. Thought it would fit perfectly into this setting <3

From Stray Kids~
creator: SunStrikeA
